footer.tagline: The fastest first step toward a web for everyone

landing.heroEyebrow: Automated web accessibility audits & remediation guides
landing.heroDesc: Enter one URL — we collect representative pages, audit them against WCAG 2.2 and KWCAG 2.2, and produce an audit report with practical remediation guides.
landing.featuresTitle: From audit to remediation, in one place

features.autoDesc: The axe-core engine collects representative pages and checks ~90 rules automatically.
features.kwcagDesc: See WCAG 2.2 and all 33 KWCAG 2.2 checkpoints together in one report.
features.reportDesc: Review violations with code locations and remediation guides, then download as PDF.
features.manualDesc: We never hide what automation can't judge — each manual checkpoint ships with testing instructions.

landing.how1Desc: Sign in and enter your site address; representative pages are collected automatically.
landing.how2Desc: A headless browser opens each page and audits it against WCAG · KWCAG.
landing.how3Desc: Compliance rate, checkpoint matrix, and remediation guides — on the web and in PDF.
landing.honestyDesc: Automated tools can only find part of all accessibility issues. A11Y Check states its limits clearly and guides you through the checks that require a human.
landing.openSourceDesc: The audit engine and rule catalog are MIT-licensed. Contributions to the guides are welcome.

demo.title: Web Accessibility Audit Report
demo.sampleCaption: The card above is an illustrative sample. Running an audit produces a real report in this format.

landing.ctaDemoReport: See a real sample report (our own audit)

login.title: Sign in
login.desc: Continue with a social account or your email.
login.privacy: We only collect your profile (name, email) to manage your audit history.
login.sent: We sent a sign-in link to your email. Check your inbox (and spam folder).
login.sendFailed: Failed to send. Please try again shortly.
login.errorConfirm: The link has expired or was already used. Please request a new one.
login.forgotDesc: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
login.signUpSent: We sent a confirmation email. Click the link (check spam too) to finish signing up.
login.resetSent: We sent a reset link to your email. Please check your inbox.
login.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
login.errNotConfirmed: Your email isn't confirmed yet. Click the link in your inbox first.
login.errExists: This email is already registered. Sign in or reset your password.
login.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.

scanPage.title: Run Audit
scanPage.desc: Enter the site URL and choose how to build the sample. The audit runs against WCAG 2.2 and KWCAG 2.2 and produces a report.
scanPage.modeAutoDesc: Builds a representative sample from the sitemap and internal links (WCAG-EM structured + random sample).
scanPage.modeManualDesc: You specify the exact pages to audit. Only pages on the same site (same domain) are allowed.
scanPage.manualOriginHint: Only pages on the same domain as the audit URL are allowed; extra lines beyond the limit are dropped.
scanPage.accessCheckLink: Does the site block bots? Check auditability →
scanPage.manualOverLimit: You entered more pages than this domain's limit ({max}). Please reduce to {max} or fewer.
scanPage.manualVerifyHint: Verifying domain ownership raises the limit to {verified} pages.
scanPage.manualHostMismatch: These pages are on a different host than the audit URL ({host}) and cannot be scanned. Remove or fix these lines.

apiErrors.quota_daily: You have used all of your daily scan quota ({limit}).
apiErrors.quota_weekly: You have used all of your weekly scan quota ({limit}).
apiErrors.quota_monthly: You have used all of your monthly scan quota ({limit}).
apiErrors.concurrent: A scan is already in progress. Please try again after it finishes.
apiErrors.manualOverLimit: You entered {count} pages, but this domain's limit is {limit} pages.
apiErrors.manualOverLimitVerify: You entered {count} pages, but this domain's limit is {limit} pages. Verify domain ownership to scan more pages.
apiErrors.createFailed: Failed to create the scan. Please try again shortly.
apiErrors.invalidInput: Please check the URL to scan.
apiErrors.url_invalid_url: That doesn't look like a valid URL.
apiErrors.url_bad_scheme: Only http/https addresses can be scanned.
apiErrors.url_private_address: Private/internal network addresses cannot be scanned.
apiErrors.url_resolve_failed: Host not found. Please check the address.
apiErrors.url_fetch_failed: Could not reach the target. Please try again shortly.
apiErrors.pageOtherDomain: A page is on a different domain or invalid: {url}
apiErrors.pagesEmpty: Please enter at least one page to scan.

accessCheck.title: Bot-block checker
accessCheck.desc: Diagnose whether and how a site blocks automated audit bots. Does not use your audit quota.
accessCheck.failed: Diagnosis failed. Please try again shortly.

ok.label: ✓ Automated audit possible
ok.desc: No bot blocking detected. You can run the automated audit right away.
ok.solution: No action needed — start your audit.

robots-blocked.label: Blocked by robots.txt
robots-blocked.desc: The site's robots.txt disallows our audit bot. A11Y Check respects robots.txt, so automated audits will not run in this state.
robots-blocked.solution: If you manage the site, add an allow rule for a11ychk-bot (guide #1 below). Otherwise, audit with the Chrome extension.

ua-blocked.label: Bot User-Agent blocked
ua-blocked.desc: Regular browsers connect fine, but the audit bot's User-Agent is blocked — a server or WAF UA filter.
ua-blocked.solution: Ask the site admin to allow the a11ychk-bot User-Agent (guide #2). For an immediate audit, use the Chrome extension.

challenge.label: Bot-defense challenge
challenge.desc: A bot-defense service (e.g. Cloudflare) is blocking all automated access. Allowing the UA alone may not be enough.
challenge.solution: Add an exception for a11ychk-bot in the security service, or audit with the Chrome extension — it runs in your real browser, unaffected by bot defenses.

http-error.label: HTTP error
http-error.desc: The page returns an error regardless of bot blocking. Check the address and whether the site is up.
http-error.solution: Verify the URL and try again shortly.

unreachable.label: Unreachable
unreachable.desc: Could not connect to the site — wrong address, DNS issue, or temporary outage.
unreachable.solution: Verify the URL and try again shortly.

accessCheck.extensionCta: Audit with the Chrome extension → (works despite bot blocking / login)
accessCheck.guideDesc: Recommended solutions by block type. The Chrome extension always works.

robots.title: Allow the audit bot in robots.txt
robots.desc: If you manage the site, add the rule below. A11Y Check is a well-behaved bot that respects robots.txt, so an allow rule is all it takes.

waf.title: Allow the User-Agent in your WAF/CDN
waf.desc: If you use Cloudflare, AWS WAF, etc., add a skip/allow rule for the audit bot UA. In Cloudflare: Security → WAF → Custom rules with a User-Agent condition.

extension.title: Audit with the Chrome extension (most reliable)
extension.desc: The extension runs inside your real browser, so it audits any page regardless of bot blocking, login, or intranet restrictions. Results are saved to your account.

staging.title: Audit a staging environment
staging.desc: If you can't add security exceptions in production, audit a staging/dev URL without bot defenses. Note it must be reachable from the public internet — private IPs cannot be audited.

scanCta.title: Start a new audit
scanCta.desc: On the audit page, build the sample automatically or enter pages manually, then start the audit.

scanForm.label: Page URL to audit
scanForm.targetHint: The WCAG-EM Step 1 target level. Most audits use AA. Defaults to AA if left blank.
scanForm.notesPlaceholder: Purpose, special considerations, etc. (recorded in the report)
scanForm.hint: Only public pages can be audited. Verified domains get up to 10 pages; others get 5.
scanForm.extensionLink: Audit pages behind login with the Chrome extension →

domains.title: My domains
domains.empty: No domains yet. Register and verify a domain to audit more pages per scan.
domains.verifyMeta: Or add to your homepage <head>: <meta name="a11ychk-verify" content="{token}">
domains.verifyFailed: Verification failed. DNS/deploy changes can take a few minutes.

recent.title: Recent audits
recent.empty: No audits yet — start your first one above.

scan.title: Audit progress
scan.runningDesc: Collecting representative pages and running the automated audit. This takes about 1–3 minutes.

score.title: Automated compliance rate
score.desc: Share of automatically checkable rules that passed. This measures automated coverage, not overall accessibility.

scores.combinedDesc: Final rate integrating automated checks and reviewer judgments.
scores.automatedDesc: Automatically determined by axe, custom rules, and site-level checks.
scores.manualDesc: Judgments entered by the reviewer after manual inspection.
scores.legend: Combined uses the reviewer's judgment for each criterion when present, otherwise the automated result.

metaForm.hint: This information appears on the report cover, print output, and the WCAG-EM Report Tool export.
metaForm.title: Report title
metaForm.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Codeslog Web Accessibility Evaluation Report
metaForm.executiveSummaryPlaceholder: Write an overall assessment. Shown at the top of the printed report.
metaForm.failed: Failed to save. Please try again shortly.

review.notePlaceholder: Record how you tested and what you found.

pages.title: Sample pages
pages.summary: {done} of {total} sample pages audited; {failed} failed. Failed pages usually succeed on a re-run — see the reasons below.

em.repOk: The random sample surfaced no violation types absent from the structured sample. The sample is sufficiently representative.
em.repNew: The random sample surfaced {count} additional violation rule(s) not in the structured sample. A broader sample may be warranted for the full site.
em.statement: This report is an automated evaluation structured per WCAG-EM (Website Accessibility Conformance Evaluation Methodology), targeting WCAG 2.2 level {target}. It covers only what automated testing can judge and excludes items marked 'manual check' and multi-step processes. A complete WCAG 2.2 conformance determination requires expert manual evaluation; this automated evaluation alone does not support a conformance claim.

wcag.title: WCAG 2.2 success criteria results
wcag.desc: WCAG-EM Step 4 — automated outcome per success criterion at the target level.
wcag.notCheckedNote: 'Manual check' means the success criterion cannot be judged automatically and requires human verification. Use the 'manual checks' section below and the Chrome extension.

kwcag.title: KWCAG 2.2 checkpoint matrix
kwcag.desc: Automated results for all 33 checkpoints of the Korean Web Content Accessibility Guidelines 2.2.

violations.title: Violations & remediation guides
violations.empty: No violations found by the automated audit. Please review the manual checkpoints.

manual.title: Checkpoints requiring manual testing
manual.desc: These checkpoints cannot be judged automatically — a human must verify them. Use the instructions below or get a professional audit.

failedPages.title: Pages that could not be audited
failedPages.desc: The following pages were excluded from this automated audit for the reasons below. Re-running the audit shortly usually resolves them.

reasons.timeout: The page did not finish loading within the time limit. This can happen with slow or heavy sites.
reasons.unreachable: The page could not be reached. The address may have changed or the connection was temporarily unstable.
reasons.blocked: The page could not be audited due to site policy (e.g. robots rules) or because it resolved to a private/internal address.
reasons.temporary: A temporary error occurred during the audit. Re-running usually resolves it.
reasons.engine: The audit engine hit a temporary problem. Please try again.
reasons.unknown: This page could not be audited for an unknown reason. Please try again.

report.disclaimer: This report is produced by an automated tool (axe-core) and does not guarantee overall accessibility compliance. Automated audits detect only a subset of issues; official certification requires expert manual review.

inline.reviewIntro: Automated tooling could not judge these rules. Verify them using the guidance below, then record your outcome via 'Review'.
inline.manualFallback: This success criterion is not covered by automated testing. See the W3C Understanding document for testing guidance.

rescan.failed: Rescan failed. Please try again shortly.

reviewData.title: Collected values for review
reviewData.desc: Automation confirmed these values exist; whether they are meaningful requires human judgment. Skim the collected values, then record pass/fail in the matrices above.
reviewData.altsHint: Check that each alt text actually conveys the image's meaning.
reviewData.labelsHint: Check that each label clearly says what to enter.
reviewData.genericLinksHint: Passes if the surrounding sentence or list clarifies the link's purpose.

compare.title: Change since previous audit
compare.desc: Compared with the audit on {date}. See the effect of your remediation work.

share.onDesc: Anyone with the link can view this report (read-only).

priority.title: Top fixes
priority.desc: Highest-impact violations by severity and scale. Fixing them in this order yields the biggest improvement.

error.impersonation: Nicknames that could impersonate an administrator or operator are not allowed.
error.failed: Failed to save. Please try again shortly.

inquiries.title: Support & feature requests
inquiries.desc: Tell us about problems or ideas. Replies appear on this page.

admin.title: Admin console
admin.denied: This page is for administrators only.

plansControl.hint: While inactive, all users run on the free tier's limits and sample size. Activating makes assigned plans take effect.

users.title: User management
users.customHint: Leave blank to use the plan default; enter a number to set a per-user limit
users.bulkHint: Applies the selected plan to every user. Per-user custom limits are cleared. (Group management for future monetization)
users.pagesHint: Page limit: doubled for verified domains, max {max} pages

settings.title: Settings
settings.bulkPagesLabel: Bulk set page limit for all users
settings.bulkPagesHint: Sets the base page limit for every user (doubled for verified domains, max {max} pages). Apply with an empty value to revert to plan/default limits.

logs.title: Logs
logs.notMigrated: Log tables do not exist yet. Apply supabase/migrations/0006_admin_logs.sql in the Supabase SQL Editor.
logs.errorsNotMigrated: Error log table does not exist yet. Apply supabase/migrations/0008_app_errors.sql in the Supabase SQL Editor.

guide.title: Manual testing guide
guide.desc: KWCAG 2.2 checkpoints that automation cannot judge, with instructions for testing them yourself. Identical to the 'manual checks' section of A11Y Check reports.

extension.title: Connect Chrome extension
extension.desc: Install the A11Y Check Chrome extension to audit pages behind login or the screen you're working on, and use the manual checklist. Connect the extension to your account on this page.
extension.step1: Install the 'A11Y Check' extension from the Chrome Web Store.
extension.step2: Keep this page open and the extension connects to your account automatically.
extension.step3: Once connected, use 'Save results to my account' in the extension popup.
extension.waiting: Waiting for the extension to connect…
extension.notInstalled: If the extension isn't installed or recognized yet, install it and refresh this page.

errors.notFoundDesc: The address may have changed or the page was removed.

about.title: About
about.intro: A11Y Check is a web accessibility evaluation tool: automated audits plus an evaluator workbench for manual judgments, producing complete evaluation reports. Start with one URL and get a WCAG-EM structured report with remediation guides.
about.methodDesc: Not an ad-hoc checker — we follow the criteria and methodology defined by the W3C and Korean standards.

wcagem.name: WCAG-EM
wcagem.desc: The W3C's official website accessibility evaluation methodology: scope → explore → sample → audit → report, with exports compatible with the official Report Tool.

wcag.name: WCAG 2.2
wcag.desc: The international Web Content Accessibility Guidelines. Automated outcomes for all 55 A/AA success criteria.

kwcag.name: KWCAG 2.2
kwcag.desc: The Korean Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (KS X OT0003) — a 33-checkpoint matrix aligned with domestic certification criteria.

auto.name: Automated audits
auto.desc: Build a representative sample automatically from sitemaps and links, or specify pages manually; the axe-core engine checks ~90 rules.

workbench.name: Evaluation workbench
workbench.desc: Record manual outcomes and observations per success criterion on top of automated results, add report details and an executive summary, and produce print/PDF reports.

extension.name: Chrome extension
extension.desc: Audit pages behind login or bot-blocked sites right in your browser, saving results to your account.

badge.name: Accessibility badge
badge.desc: Publish an SVG badge showing the latest compliance rate for your verified domain.

schedule.name: Scheduled audits
schedule.desc: Enable per-domain daily automated audits to continuously track accessibility.

about.honestyDesc: Automated tools find only part of all accessibility issues. A11Y Check states this limit in every report and honestly marks human-required checks as 'manual' with testing guidance. Our automated evaluation alone does not support a conformance claim.
about.openDesc: The audit engine, WCAG/KWCAG mapping catalog, and remediation guides are all MIT-licensed. Anyone can verify and contribute.

impact.title: The impact of A11Y Check
impact.desc: A11Y Check is an open-source service run for the public good of web accessibility. We publish aggregate metrics of the change it creates — no individual site or user data is included.

improve.title: Verified improvements
improve.desc: When a site is re-audited with fewer violations or a higher compliance rate than its first audit, we count it as a verified improvement.

oss.title: Open source
oss.desc: The audit engine and the full Korean-language KWCAG 2.2 rule catalog are MIT-licensed. Anyone can verify and contribute.

impact.note: Metrics refresh hourly (last computed: {date}). Compliance rates cover the automated scope only — automated tools find part of all accessibility issues.

usage.title: Report usage
usage.desc: Signals that reports are turning into real remediation work.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.desc: Enter the new password you want to use.
reset.done: Password changed. Redirecting to your dashboard…
reset.noSession: The reset link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one from the sign-in page.
reset.errShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
reset.errGeneric: Failed to change. Please try again.
